tools.name: vault_get
tools.description: Read a bounded public-safe excerpt or capped content from a Research Vault note by id.

id.description: Research Vault note id returned by vault_search

include_content.description: Return capped content instead of the default excerpt

max_chars.description: Maximum returned content characters, capped at 12000

tools.name: vault_search
tools.description: Search the Research Vault knowledge base. Returns analyzed papers with retention scores.

query.description: Search query (matches title, content, id, and category)

tools.name: vault_status
tools.description: Get Research Vault health — item counts by decay level, top/bottom retention.

tools.name: vault_batch_analyze
tools.description: Check batch analyze status and pending papers in the raw queue.

tools.name: vault_taxonomy
tools.description: Get the Research Vault taxonomy — all categories and counts.

agent_guidance.reason: vault_delete is admin-only and unavailable while Research Vault MCP is running in readonly profile.
agent_guidance.next_step: Use vault_search for readonly evidence, or start a private admin operator session with MCP_PROFILE=admin; readonly/full profiles are insufficient for destructive/admin tools.
